name: Lemon-Ginger Cornish Hens
recipeInstructions:
1. Marinate the Cornish Hens: Grate zest from 3 lemons and juice all 6 lemons. In a medium bowl whisk together grated lemon zest, lemon juice, ginger, honey, and oil. Add lemongrass. Season to taste with salt and pepper. Split the Cornish Hens in half lengthwise. Arrange them in a single layer in a large plastic bag set in a shallow roasting pan. Pour marinade over hens. Tie the bag tightly closed, pressing as much marinade as possible up around the hens. Refrigerate 12 hours or overnight, turning the bag once.
2. Roast the Hens: Preheat oven to 375°F. Drain the hens, reserving the marinade. Discard lemongrass from the marinade. Arrange the hens skin side up in the same baking pan. Pour half the marinade over the hens. Bake at 375°F for 35 minutes. Baste the hens with pan juices. Continue baking until the juices run clear when the thighs are pierced with a fork.
